name: The Constabulary
description: A wood and stone building in Lankshorn. A breggle clerk in red leather armor with a horned helmet mans the front desk.
notes: Constable Sidney Wolder met the party here in a back room. He paid out the crookhorn bounty and advised them not to return to Droomen Knoll — then suggested they seek out Sgt. Marge Bregson if they wanted support.
The party sought official backing for their return to Droomen Knoll and were not taken seriously.
Sgt. Marge Bregson operates here; she reluctantly agreed to send Brennan with the party as an informant.
